overlay_color.a: v.phase = v.phase ?? 0.0; v.hsv_p = v.hsv_p ?? 0.0; v.is_hurt = v.is_hurt ?? false; v.hurt_time = v.hurt_time ?? 0.0; v.hurt_delta = v.hurt_delta ?? 0.0; v.rainbow = v.rainbow ?? false; v.hurt_time = !v.is_hurt ? q.life_time; v.is_hurt = false; return this;
